title: Immersive Positional Resources
description: Customize Immersive Engineering mineral vein's spawn based on distance from world spawn
body:
**This mod is for modpack dev only! If not configured properly, it'll break Immersive miners!**

This mod allows you to add `minDistance` and `maxDistance` to Immersive mineral veins.

Look at additional files for an example on how to configure it.

For any problems, join my Discord: [https://discord.gg/KuATzTKkEE](https://discord.gg/KuATzTKkEE)
